function.name: create_emergency_case
function.description: Create a new emergency case record in the live database. Call immediately when a new patient is identified or the situation changes significantly.

patient_name.description: Patient name if known. Use 'Unknown' if unidentified.

location.description: Current location or landmark. E.g. 'NH-44 near Koyambedu', 'Sector 22 Chandigarh'.

chief_complaint.description: Primary complaint or incident description. Keep concise.

urgency_level.description: Urgency classification based on patient condition.

function.name: log_vitals
function.description: Log patient vital signs into the database for real-time dashboard tracking. Call every time vitals are spoken or measured.

case_id.description: UUID of the active emergency case. If unknown, pass 'current' and the system will resolve it.

heart_rate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Omit to use server time.

function.name: get_patient_history
function.description: Retrieve prior emergency cases and timeline for a patient by name. Use to check allergies, chronic conditions, or recent admissions.

patient_name.description: Full or partial patient name to search.

function.name: find_nearest_hospital
function.description: Find the nearest available hospital with emergency capacity. Returns distance, capacity, and specialties.

location.description: Current location string or GPS coordinates.

function.name: notify_supervisor
function.description: Send an urgent alert to the medical supervisor. Use only for CRITICAL or URGENT situations requiring oversight.

case_id.description: UUID of the active case. Pass 'current' if unknown.

message.description: Concise alert message. E.g. 'CRITICAL: Cardiac arrest, CPR in progress, ETA 8 min'.

function.name: set_noise_level
function.description: Update the environment noise level on the dashboard so the EMS team can see conditions. Call when the agent detects high noise, when the user asks for a repeat, or when noise subsides.

case_id.description: UUID of the active case. Pass 'current' if unknown.

level.description: Detected noise level. 'high' or 'extreme' will activate adaptive clarity mode on the dashboard.
